case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. WELDON JACKSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, WELDON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
